compiled_state.title: Generate debug-everything eval scaffolding and RED eval for worktree isolation
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

1. Run generate-skill-eval.sh debug-everything to create eval scaffolding
2. Add eval test case asserting debug-everything dispatches with isolation:worktree when config enabled
3. Test case must FAIL against current debug-everything SKILL.md

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (CREATE)

### TDD Requirement
Eval scaffolding + RED test case bundled because scaffolding alone is not testable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Has worktree isolation test case
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree.*isolation\|isolation.*worktree' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

comments.body: AC amendment: Add negative eval test case — when worktree.isolation_enabled=false, assert debug-everything dispatch does NOT include isolation:worktree.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation — RED confirmed ✓ (0 passed, 5 failed — eval runs, worktree isolation test cases fail as expected)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: debug-everything eval scaffolded with worktree isolation RED tests.
comments.author: Test
